name: Excellon Resources Inc.
description: Excellon Resources Inc. is a Canadian junior mining company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and advancement of silver and precious metal properties primarily in Peru and the United States. Its flagship asset is the Mallay Silver Mine in Peru, a past-producing high-grade silver-lead-zinc operation that was acquired in mid-2025 and is being advanced toward restart, alongside the Kilgore Gold Project in Idaho, USA. Excellon is a developer-stage company backed by strategic investors including Glencore and Eric Sprott, working to advance Mallay back into production.
